title: Account Manager
description:
Job Title: Account Manager - BYD/Denza

Location: Ubi

Job Description:

Key Responsibilities:

  • Business Development: Identify and pursue new B2B business opportunities for BYD's electric vehicles within the Singaporean market, targeting corporate fleets, government agencies, and commercial organizations.
  • Strategic Sales Planning: Develop and execute tailored sales strategies to achieve corporate sales targets, enhance market share, and foster long-term partnerships with business clients.
  • Lead Generation & Networking: Generate qualified leads through industry events, corporate networking, partnerships, and direct outreach to key decision-makers within businesses.
  • Client Engagement: Conduct detailed product demonstrations and presentations to business clients, addressing specific fleet or organizational needs and showcasing the benefits of BYD’s EV offerings.
  • Consultative Selling: Understand the unique requirements of business clients and provide tailored EV solutions that optimize cost-efficiency, sustainability, and operational performance.
  • Sales Negotiation & Closure: Negotiate complex deals and contracts, ensuring alignment with client goals while maximizing value for both BYD and the business customer. Focus on long-term, strategic relationships.
  • Market Intelligence: Keep up to date with market trends, competitor activities, and industry developments related to electric vehicles and sustainable transport solutions for businesses.
  • Customer Feedback & Insights: Provide valuable insights and feedback to the management team to support product development, marketing strategies, and strategic partnerships.
  • Relationship Management: Build and maintain strong, lasting relationships with key business clients and stakeholders, focusing on customer satisfaction and long-term collaboration.
  • Post-Sales Support & Client Retention: Ensure smooth post-sales implementation, address client concerns promptly, and foster repeat business through superior customer service and follow-ups.
  • Sales Administration: Maintain accurate records of sales activities, customer interactions, and pipeline status through CRM tools. Prepare and present comprehensive sales reports, forecasts, and market analysis for management.
  • Documentation & Compliance: Ensure all sales-related documentation, contracts, and agreements are completed accurately, adhering to corporate standards and legal requirements.

Qualifications:

  • Experience: Minimum of 2-5 years of sales experience in the B2B automotive industry, with a focus on electric vehicles or commercial fleets preferred.
  • Skills: Proven track record of meeting or exceeding corporate sales targets and building strong business relationships.
  • Communication: Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills, with the ability to engage senior-level decision-makers.
  • Market Knowledge: Strong understanding of the Singapore commercial automotive market and electric vehicle trends, particularly in fleet management and corporate sustainability.
  • Technical Proficiency: Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, CRM software, and sales analytics tools.

postedCompany.description:
China Harmony New Energy Auto Holding Limited, which is a leading comprehensive automobile service group in China, specializes in luxury and super luxury car brands, it was listed on the stock market of Hong Kong in 2013(hereinafter referred to as China Harmony Auto Holding Ltd., Stock code: 03836. HK).


The group will focus on the main business of luxury and super luxury automobile sales, covering the whole industry chain of new energy vehicle manufacturing, sales and after-sales service, and will provide customers with high-quality travel services of high efficiency, convenience and harmony between people and vehicles.


As of June 30, 2023 , harmony automobile has represented 14 luxury and super luxury brands, 79 authorized dealer outlets and a service network covering 40 cities in 16 provinces in China.


Harmony Group always adheres to the core values of "simplicity, efficiency, happiness and efforts are equal to all in". It aims to create a respected century old enterprise, and deeply engages in the main business of luxury and super luxury automobile sales. In addition, it invests in intelligent manufacturing, sales and after-sales business of new energy vehicles, focuses on the present, lays out the future, and seeks to create an automobile service industry ecosystem with mutual support, business collaboration and co evolution of various business sectors. It creates a harmonious life in the digital era for users with the ultimate intelligent technology and service experience, and leads the development of the industry in the future.
postedCompany.name: HARMONY NEW ENERGY AUTO SERVICE (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.
